name: document_controller_upload_pdf_drawing_to_autodesk_forma_with_validation
desc: Uploads a PDF drawing to Autodesk Forma/ACC. Validates naming, checks title block, pushes to APS Data Management API.

parameters.name: pdfPath
parameters.description: Local path to the PDF file to upload

parameters.name: skipValidation
parameters.description: Skip naming and title block validation
